name: supply-chain-and-ci-integrity
description: Blocks common supply-chain compromise and CI/CD abuse patterns including remote script execution, lockfile tampering signals, secret-bleeding CI commands, and unsafe release actions.

block.title: Block curl-pipe-shell execution
block.name: block_curl_pipe_shell_execution
block.description: Blocks remote script execution patterns frequently used in compromises.

block.title: Block wget-pipe-bash execution
block.name: block_wget_pipe_bash_execution
block.description: Blocks remote shell bootstrap patterns via wget pipelines.

block.title: Block npm preinstall script injection
block.name: block_npm_preinstall_script_injection
block.description: Blocks suspicious package script manipulation often used for supply-chain persistence.

block.title: Block dependency lockfile deletion
block.name: block_dependency_lockfile_deletion
block.description: Blocks lockfile deletion attempts that can mask dependency drift.

block.title: Block CI secret export command
block.name: block_ci_secret_export_command
block.description: Blocks explicit handling of CI auth tokens in tool command payloads.

block.title: Block release publish with embedded secrets
block.name: block_release_publish_with_secrets
block.description: Blocks package publish operations when payload includes likely secrets.
